metadata.title: Vienna
metadata.lyrics:
[00:15.93] Slow down, you crazy child
[00:18.83] You're so ambitious for a juvenile
[00:22.53] But then, if you're so smart
[00:24.21] Then tell me, why are you still so afraid? Mm
[00:28.96] 
[00:31.34] Where's the fire? What's the hurry about?
[00:33.98] You better cool it off before you burn it out
[00:37.80] You got so much to do and only so many hours
[00:41.68] In a day, hey
[00:46.28] But you know that when the truth is told
[00:49.05] That you can get what you want, or you can just get old
[00:52.74] You're gonna kick off before you even get halfway through, ooh
[01:00.19] When will you realize Vienna waits for you?
[01:07.22] 
[01:09.44] Slow down, you're doing fine
[01:12.61] You can't be everything you wanna be before your time
[01:16.29] Although it's so romantic, on the borderline
[01:20.15] Tonight, tonight
[01:24.92] Too bad, but it's the life you lead
[01:27.72] You're so ahead of yourself that you forgot what you need
[01:31.64] Though you can see when you're wrong
[01:33.38] You know you can't always see when you're right, you're right
[01:39.94] You got your passion, you got your pride
[01:42.88] But don't you know that only fools are satisfied?
[01:47.74] Dream on, but don't imagine they'll all come true, ooh
[01:54.04] When will you realize Vienna waits for you?
[02:02.03] 
[02:18.69] Slow down, you crazy child
[02:21.29] And take the phone off the hook and disappear for a while
[02:26.35] It's alright, you can afford to lose a day or two, ooh
[02:32.94] When will you realize Vienna waits for you?
[02:42.01] And you know that when the truth is told
[02:44.63] That you can get what you want, or you can just get old
[02:48.66] You're gonna kick off before you even get halfway through, ooh
[02:55.95] Why don't you realize Vienna waits for you?
[03:04.05] When will you realize Vienna waits for you?
[03:09.73]
